title: Scout Findings Handoff
description: Typed handoff payload produced by Bug Investigation Specialist or Design Planning Architect (research phase) when handing findings back to the Orchestration Governor. Compliance is instruction-enforced, not constrained-decoding enforced.

type.description: Payload type discriminator. Must always be 'scout_findings'.

producedBy.description: Name of the agent that produced this payload (e.g., 'Bug Investigation Specialist').

producedAt.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) when this payload was produced.

workPackage.description: Short identifier or task description matching the governor's delegated work unit.

findingsSummary.description: One paragraph summary of what was found during investigation.

filesExamined.description: List of file paths read or examined during the investigation.

rootCauseClassification.description: Classification of root cause complexity. 'simple' allows governor to skip Design Planning Architect (Pipeline 2 skip logic). 'architectural' requires Design Planning Architect before implementation.

recommendedNextAgent.description: Name of the agent the governor should delegate to next (e.g., 'Implementation Specialist', 'Design Planning Architect').

recommendedNextAction.description: Brief directive for the next agent describing what to do with these findings.

additionalDetails.description: Optional extended findings, stack traces, or evidence that does not fit in findingsSummary.
